creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the report & patches Curtis

Can one of you provide the changes as a single unified diff against the port (creating files/patch-* files using make makepatch [1]) please?

Also a confirmation that the port passes QA (portlint, poudriere) would also be great. Failing that, the output of the following will suffice (as an attachment):

make stage && make check-plist && make stage-qa && make package


[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/slow-patch.html
